01 · Why HVAC, Why Now

Buildings burn the world's energy. HVAC burns most of it.

Carbon capture has been treated as a problem of giant industrial smokestacks. But the biggest distributed source of indoor energy and heat — HVAC — was left to ventilate the problem out the roof. We built the device that catches it on the way out.

37%

Of all global emissions come from buildings.

The largest single emissions category in the global economy — and the one with the fewest credible technical solutions for the existing building stock.

~50%

Of building energy is consumed by HVAC.

Cooling, heating, and ventilation dominate building load — especially across MENA, where HVAC effectively runs year-round. The highest-leverage intervention point.

0

Distributed CCS players in MENA today.

Industrial-scale CCS exists. Direct air capture exists. But carbon capture designed to retrofit into the building HVAC stock that already runs across the region — nobody built it. Until now.

THE FLAGSHIP · AURACAP DEVICE

A carbon and heat capture unit engineered to integrate with the HVAC already in your building.

Existing HVAC infrastructure handles the air. AuraCap handles the carbon and the heat that air carries. One retrofit module. Two outputs: captured CO₂ and recovered thermal energy. Both measurable. Both monetizable.

Building HVAC

C-01

Built for the existing stock

Designed to retrofit onto HVAC systems already operating in commercial and institutional buildings — no rebuild, no shutdown, no special infrastructure.

C-02

Two outputs, one footprint

CO₂ captured for verified credits. Heat recovered for energy savings. The same unit creates two revenue lines from one intervention point.

C-03

Hardware-grade chemistry

Built on a fully engineered KOH-loop absorption process — 45-component v4 Bill of Materials, prioritized P0/P1/P2, fabricated locally in Jordan.

C-04

Data-native by design

Onboard sensors and MRV-ready logging. Every gram captured is timestamped, traceable, and audit-defensible from the moment it's measured.

C-05

Climate-aware engineering

Engineered for hot, dry, dusty MENA environments — temperatures, humidity, and grid conditions where global products fail. Built where it has to run.

C-06

A credit, not a claim

Captured CO₂ becomes a verified, physical-origin carbon credit — the gold standard. No estimates. No avoided-emission accounting. Just captured tons.

02 · Live Deployment

From prototype to pilot — already running.

PILOT · LIVE
CASE · 01

AuraCap × King Hussein Business Park

AuraCap is deployed on the energy and utilities infrastructure of King Hussein Business Park — Jordan's flagship business and innovation campus. The pilot validates the device in a live, mixed-use, mission-critical built-environment setting. This is not a lab. This is operating infrastructure.

SITE
King Hussein Business Park
SCOPE
Campus energy & utilities infrastructure
DEPLOYMENT
Active · operating
PROOF POINT
Hardware functions in real built environment
03 · The Stack

Three layers. One company.

AuraCap is a vertically-integrated stack. The hardware is the foundation. Everything above it — the intelligence, the registry, the credits — is only as defensible as the device that produced the data.

03 · Carbon Credits Registry
Verified credits, physical origin
Each ton traceable to a real device on a real building.
02 · Operational Intelligence
Real-time MRV & analytics
Capture rate · heat recovered · cost saved · credits earned.
01 · The Device
CO₂ + heat capture, HVAC-integrated
Proprietary hardware · KOH-loop chemistry · MENA-engineered.

The device earns the data.
The data earns the credit.

Most carbon companies start at the registry layer and reverse-engineer their way to credibility. We start at the steel — a real device on a real wall — and build upward. That order can't be faked.

HARDWARE IP KOH-LOOP CHEMISTRY ONBOARD MRV PHYSICAL-ORIGIN CREDITS MENA-ENGINEERED
04 · Where We Deploy

Anywhere HVAC runs. Especially where it runs hot.

Our primary market is the MENA built environment — buildings whose HVAC systems run nearly year-round under extreme heat. From there, the device extends into industrial process exhaust, cleanrooms, and high-load facilities.

05 · Recognition & Depth

A young company. Validated where it matters.

LIVE PILOT · 2026

Deployed at King Hussein Business Park

AuraCap is operating in the energy and utilities infrastructure of one of Jordan's most prestigious institutional campuses — proof that the device works outside a lab, in a live, mission-critical environment.

2nd PLACE · 2025

Greentech Makathon

AuraCap selected for the realism and industrial applicability of its solution — chosen over more conceptual climate ideas because the team brought engineering, not slides.

PRE-SEED · GRANT

Jordan River Foundation

Funded to advance AuraCap's deployment in Jordan. Validates a locally-engineered climate-hardware company against more conventional ESG software bids.

R&D · ENGINEERED

v4 Bill of Materials · 45 components

A complete, prioritized BOM for the KOH-loop capture system — fully specified from chemistry to fabrication, sourced for local manufacture in Jordan. The depth behind the device.

06 · Founder

Hardware is hard. That's the point.

FOUNDER & LEAD INNOVATOR
Aya

One conviction: build the steel, then the software.

AuraCap was founded on the belief that climate companies in MENA were too quick to build dashboards on top of data that didn't exist. Aya took the harder path: design a device that creates the data, then build the software that explains it, then build the registry that monetizes it.

Aya leads AuraCap's strategy and engineering — from the v4 Bill of Materials of the capture system to the architecture of the credits registry. The mission is single-line: turn every building that already cools, into a building that captures.

Carbon Literacy Certified Greentech Makathon · 2nd Jordan-based Hardware · Process · AI
07 · The Decade Ahead

In ten years, every HVAC system in the region will be a node in a distributed carbon network.
AuraCap is building the node.
